prompt: Create a luxury fashion magazine editorial in warm neutral tones, showing exactly 2 side-by-side portraits of the same elegant female model in a sunlit minimalist cream interior with tall columns and soft shadows. The left portrait is a three-quarter full-body standing pose: a tall slim woman with long dark brunette wavy hair, wearing an oversized ivory blazer, a ribbed cream tank top, high-waisted pleated ivory trousers, hands tucked casually in the trouser pockets, relaxed confident posture. The right portrait is a closer shoulder-up fashion pose: the same woman turned slightly sideways with windblown loose hair, wearing a cream tank top and the ivory blazer slipped off one shoulder for an effortless editorial styling. Both faces are intentionally obscured by smooth rectangular skin-tone blocks with no facial features, matching the surrounding complexion. Use ivory, cream, beige, and warm sand, soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, creamy highlights, subtle fabric texture, polished high-fashion styling, clean composition, luxurious quiet-luxury aesthetic, realistic photography, medium-format camera look, 1:1 square crop, no text, no logos, no extra people.
